issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card text states '[When Attacking]' which is an attack trigger, not an activated ability.
Condition should be 'HasRestingDon' with count 2, which is correct, but the logic is incomplete: the effect requires you to HAVE at least 2 resting DON!! to trigger, not spend them.

Action type is wrong. 'GiveDon' with count 1 does not match the effect. 'Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active' means REST (flip from resting to active), not give/gain DON. Should use 'Rest' action targeting a resting DON card.
Target scope 'Self' is incorrect. The action should target up to 1 resting DON card on your board, not the card itself.
